entry.title: Please Stay
entry.summary:
Author: Da_Little_knight

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,265Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 3

Summary: This is my first fan fic so pls be nice. For Felix, independence has always been a necessity, not a choice. Trust is dangerous. Attachment is worse. And relying on other people has only ever led to disappointment. But when a chance encounter introduces him to people determined to help, Felix discovers that some battles are harder to fight alone-and that sometimes the scariest thing isn't being abandoned.It's letting someone stay. Or Felix is tramatized and Chan helps him

entry.title: crossroad matches
entry.summary:
Author: bonesofyu

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,618Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

Summary: Chan has never looked twice at a man. Or, at least, not with any intention. Maybe his gaze lingers, but if it's lingering then it is only one glance overall, so not doubling back. He’s been surrounded by men who were picked by the industry for so long he’s used to seeing pretty men and sees nothing in regards to attraction. That’s never changed. Not until Seonghwa sunk into the seat across from him, plush lips curled into a shy smile, the simplicity of his turtleneck, simple jewellery and soft makeup carving him into something so beautiful Chan can’t even process it properly.  There’s always gonna be that one exception, right? For some people, it’s a neatly styled celebrity on a flashy ad or movie poster. For Chan, maybe it’s just Seonghwa. Or, Chan tries Tinder for the first time, but his date's choice of location isn't exactly uncommon for first dates.

entry.title: Bang Chan's Tutorial for Topping (GONE WRONG!!!)
entry.summary:
Author: anemoiadawn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,870Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 103

Summary: "It won't mean anything, Lixie," Chan assures him for the thousandth time in the last hour. "Just, y'know. Bros teaching bros how to fuck other bros." Felix laughs. It's genuine, finally, but more from shock at Chan making a joke in this position rather than actually finding it funny. "Shut the fuck up, Christopher." Obedient as ever, Chan shuts up, and those adorable little dimples pop up on his cute little cheeks with the smile that breaks out onto his face. Felix wants nothing more than to kiss them, along with just about every inch of Chan's body. No. Felix shakes his head to snap out of it. This doesn't mean anything, this won't mean anything. It'll be impossible to convince himself of that, of course— but Chan believes it. This doesn't mean anything to Chan. He just likes to help. That's it.aka chan teaches felix how to top, strictly as friends— nothing more

entry.title: a new sub
entry.summary:
Author: seungmnbias

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,840Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 527

Summary: "So you're interested in experiencing some aspects of subbing?"  "Well—," Jeongin faltered. "I mean, I guess? But like I said, I don't actually want to do a scene, cause I don't want to do anything sexual. So it's not like I could actually be in subspace."  "Why not?" Chan asked, and Jeongin looked at him like he was stupid. "I just said. I don't want to do a scene with you guys cause I don't like sex. You know this, hyung."  "No, I know you don't like sex. But there are ways we could put you in subspace without doing anything sexual. If subbing for us is something you want to try then we definitely could."  Jeongin stared at him. "What?"  "Jeonginnie, did you think BDSM had to be sexual?"    OR: Jeongin learns that submission doesn't have to be sexual

entry.title: sweet reign on me
entry.summary:
Author: Iridescent_thinking17

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,175Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 187

Summary: Now in total privacy, Chan lets his eyes run down Felix's body, over his exposed stomach and the distinct lack of hair usually peeking from the waistband of his pants. His skin shines with a layer of sweat, and saliva pools on Chan's tongue with the thought of running it down the dip of Felix's abs. "I should just take it all off, huh?" Felix teases, mocking Chan's line from earlier on stage. He's got a hand in Chan's hair, slightly tugging at it until Chan's breath hitches.OR Riding on the high of performing on stage, Chan and Felix stumble back to the hotel room to finally give into their desires for one another.

entry.title: Anchored
entry.summary:
Author: Kpoplover08

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,659Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 146

Summary: Han never expected to find a place where he felt safe. After years of feeling untethered in a world that demands labels and classifications, he finds himself thrust into a polycule that sees him—really sees him. What starts as tentative trust slowly becomes something deeper: comfort, belonging, and the terrifying possibility of permanence. But choosing to be anchored means choosing vulnerability. And Han has to decide if he’s ready to stop standing alone.

entry.title: My Dreams, All Reality
entry.summary:
Author: BruisedMint

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,397Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 327

Summary: “Oh?” Chan asks, humor laced through his tone. Felix has only known him for a few hours, but he can hear it, the laugh he's fighting, the dimple in his cheek. “Would Hyunjinnie want to join us, then?” Felix inhales sharply as his pulse jumps. Hyunjin’s head whirls around, eyes wide as he meets Chan's gaze. Felix can hear his own heartbeat in his ears. “Wh– what?” Hyunjin whispers, finally letting himself look at Felix. He can't interpret what he sees in his best friend's eyes, but he hopes his own sudden anticipation isn't too apparent. “Felix?” He releases a measured breath, praying it doesn't seem too jittery as he shrugs haphazardly. “Sure. I mean, why not? We never- uh, we've never done that, but. We're best friends, right? What. What could go wrong?” ˚ʚ♡ɞ˚ Felix brings Chan home from the bar to get laid but accidentally ends up in his best friend and roommate Hyunjin's room—who he's in love with, by the way. What could possibly go wrong?

entry.title: The Spaces Between Us
entry.summary:
Author: OT8_AtinyStay

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,909Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 21

Summary: With a little probing, she managed to make him open up and he explained his entire romantic past, and the behaviour problems he couldn't seem to fix. Towards the end, he just kept repeating "what is wrong with me?" while he stained Mary's top with tears as she held him in strong arms. When he finally seemed to calm down, she wiped the remaining tears from his eyes and asked him a question that would change the trajectory of his life."Have you heard of BDSM?"-----------This story will be OT8 eventually but we start off with Sangie and Yuyu for the first few chapters. I will add tags as I go so I don't spoil anything, but I think I've put most of the important ones so you can decide if you want to read it or not.

entry.title: Lucky Girl
entry.summary:
Author: karmaswhiskee

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 146,773Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 196

Summary: “GIRL!” Alicia unleashes a muffled scream. “You fucking won! Oh my God, you fucking actually won!”“Dude, what? What did I win?”“The competition to become the ‘9th member’ of Stray Kids for a year! This is the letter babe! Oh my god, I need autographs, you have to promise!”I sigh. “Alicia, slow down. I know they’re having this competition, but I didn’t enter, so this literally cannot be real.”“That’s because we entered for you!”Every sound around me suddenly disappears; all I can hear is the thudding pulse in my eardrums. No way. “Wha-what? Who’s we?”“Okay. Remember how I told you this was a special birthday and that you’d never forget your twenty-first?”“Yes…”

entry.title: Love Our Way
entry.summary:
Author: Dimplesgirl2004

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,329Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Part two of Fate will intervene. Amelia and Minho have finally settled into their relationship after their rocky start. Soon they realize their relationship may not look like a typical relationship, especially when it comes to Chan and Jisung. All four of them must navigate this new dynamic and deal with all the feelings that come to the surface. Some handle that better than others.

entry.title: Reset
entry.summary:
Author: weirdquoki

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,256Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 215

Summary: “Jisung, I’ll only ask one more time. Would you please come here? Hyung just wants to talk to you,” Chan asked, more stern this time. Changbin plopped Jisung into Chan’s lap, who was quick to restrain him, holding his hands against his thighs. Changbin maneuvered himself back into his chair, scooting closer to be able to wrap his arms around Jisung from behind. As much as he squirmed, he was effectively trapped as the filling of a muscle sandwich. “Hyungs!” He whined. “C’mon let me gooo!” Jisung fought against them for a good while, squirming and flailing and saying hateful words he didn’t mean. They both ignored him and continued to hold him tight, allowing the pressure to slowly ground him. It wasn’t long before Jisung quieted, his body melting into their embrace. A small sniffle was their indicator that Jisung was finally ready to let them help. Changbin rubbed soothing circles against his skin while Chan thumbed his fresh tears away. “What's wrong, baby boy? Is your pretty little brain being too loud?” Or; Chan and Changbin know just how to help their little sweet, bratty little sub feel better.

entry.title: You Burn Like Whiskey (HyunChan)
entry.summary:
Author: Raynepotatoalien

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,752Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: Hwang Hyunjin works at a quiet bar social in Seoul, Korea, and loves it very much. He's on shift from 5-12 pm and sees many regulars… But only one catches his eye. Bang Chan. The classy, well groomed man who came in for a few glasses of Whiskey alone after work on Fridays. He was gorgeous, with deep brown eyes and jet black hair that curled at the ends, and a thick Australian accent that rolled when he spoke. What happens when they catch each other alone? (I do not own Stray Kids, this is a work of fiction and is not meant to promote or predict the members' real life views, sexualities, etc. I OWN THIS FIC AND ALL RIGHTS TO IT ©Raynepotatoalien.)

entry.title: Red Lights ✰
entry.summary:
Author: emosubinforlife

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,243Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 17

Summary: ⋆౨ৎ˚ ꒰Nᴏ ᴍᴀᴛᴛᴇʀ ʜᴏᴡ ʜᴀʀᴅ I ᴛʀʏ ᴛᴏ ᴇsᴄᴀᴘᴇ, ᴛʜᴇʀᴇ's ɴᴏ ᴀɴsᴡᴇʀ꒱ ── .✦ "You were supposed to leave..." Chan murmured, leaning closer, his breath warm against Hyunjin's ear. "You said... You swore... You were supposed to leave me..." "M...Maybe... maybe I can't..." Hyunjin whispered quickly, feeling the air escape his painfully squeezed lungs at an overwhelming pace. ₊ ⊹ . ₊˖ . ₊ . ₊ . ₊˖ . ₊ . ₊ ⊹ . ₊˖ . ₊
